---
name: Feature request
about: Propose a Hermes Vault capability or workflow improvement
title: "feature: "
labels: "enhancement, needs: design"
assignees: ""
---

## Problem

What workflow, integration, or safety gap should this solve?

## Proposed solution

Describe the behavior you want.

## User or agent workflow

Who uses this and how?

- Operator CLI
- Hermes agent or sub-agent
- MCP host
- Dashboard user
- Maintainer/release workflow
- Other:

## Credential and policy impact

Does this affect credential storage, brokered access, policy, audit, verification, OAuth, MCP, or dashboard boundaries?

## Compatibility notes

Should this preserve existing CLI flags, policy schema, backup format, generated skills, or MCP tool contracts?

## Alternatives considered

What did you try or consider instead?

## Additional context

Add mockups, command sketches, or links. Do not include real secrets, vault databases, raw token responses, or private provider logs.
